mapper.select: SELECT c.no, c.board_no, c.writer_id, m.nickname AS writer_nickname, c.parent_no, c.content, c.is_deleted, TO_CHAR(c.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS reg_date FROM ow_comment c JOIN ow_member m ON c.writer_id = m.id WHERE c.board_no = #{boardNo} ORDER BY NVL(c.parent_no, c.no), c.no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ow_comment(no, board_no, writer_id, parent_no, content) VALUES(seq_ow_comment_no.NEXTVAL, #{boardNo}, #{writerId}, #{parentNo}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE ow_comment SET is_deleted = 'Y', content = '삭제된 댓글입니다.' WHERE no = #{no}
mapper.select: SELECT c.no, c.board_no, c.content, b.title AS board_title, TO_CHAR(c.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS reg_date FROM ow_comment c JOIN ow_board b ON c.board_no = b.no WHERE c.writer_id = #{writerId} AND c.is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY c.no DESC
